host.description: Domain name or IP where OneUptime server is hosted

provision.description: Automatically provision a Let's Encrypt certificate for the primary host

skipVerification.description: Skip TLS certificate verification for outbound HTTPS requests. Not safe for production.

ipWhitelist.description: Comma-separated list of probe egress IP addresses for firewall whitelisting. Returned via the /ip-whitelist API endpoint.

disableDeployments.description: When set to true, no OneUptime deployments are provisioned. Only databases (Redis, ClickHouse, Postgres) will be running.

webhookSecret.description: Stripe webhook secret for automatic invoice emails
